basic_details.job_title: IIPS Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters Degree in Demography/Population Studies/Any other Social Sciences
qualification.details: Masters Degree in Demography/Population Studies/Any other Social Sciences

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIPS Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIPS Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Assistant position at IIPS is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Demography, Population Studies, or any other Social Sciences discipline to be eligible for the Research Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant role at IIPS will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in this interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the General/OBC categories. It is advisable to check the official notification for any specific details regarding application fees for other categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant position at the International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this IIPS recruitment?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant position is offered on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed duration as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the IIPS located?
faq.answer: The International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra. This is where the recruitment is being conducted.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.

faq.question: Q10. What is the date of the online interview?
faq.answer: The online interview for the Research Assistant position is scheduled to be held on 11th June 2026. Candidates should be prepared for this date.
